    Methods in com.gpudb that return AggregateGroupByResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AggregateGroupByResponse
    GPUdb.aggregateGroupBy(AggregateGroupByRequest request)
    Calculates unique combinations (groups) of values for the given columns in a given table or view and computes aggregates on each unique combination.
    AggregateGroupByResponse
    GPUdb.aggregateGroupBy(String tableName, List<String> columnNames, long offset, long limit, Map<String,String> options)
    Calculates unique combinations (groups) of values for the given columns in a given table or view and computes aggregates on each unique combination.
